title: Prima 13029C Heavy-Duty Crackers – Premium Zinc Alloy Splitter Opener with Non-Slip Handle – Nutcrackers, Walnuts, Hard Shell Nuts, Seafood
features: A Must for Every Kitchen: With the PRIMA nut cracker you can enjoy your favorite selection of nuts without putting too much effort in opening the hard shell. Our nut splitter is very practical and easy to manoeuvre, a must-have for people who can’t resist the incomparable taste of nuts.

Made to Last: The PRIMA nut crackers are made with top-quality zinc alloy, which provides increased durability and resistance. Also, the material will not rust easily, it’s safe and strong, so you can enjoy this walnut opener for many years to come.

Practical Design: Our nut crackers heavy-duty is lightweight, flexible, and it can expand up to 180-degrees. The cracker is also equipped with a non-slip handle that ensures a good grip and the optimal amount of pressure, without hurting your hands.

Versatile Use: This fantastic walnut cracker features 2 different types of clamps, that allow you to crush at the same time or split open any kind of nuts, such as pecan nuts, walnuts, hazelnuts in shell, hard shell nuts, or seafood.

Easy Care: Not only is very practical but also long-lasting and easy to maintain. The nut cracker has a smooth finish and a simple design for effortless cleaning, as you only need to place it in the dishwasher or rinse it with water.
